steps.label: Show the empty canvas
steps.narration: Welcome to StickerNest — an infinite canvas where everything comes alive.

steps.label: Show the toolbar
steps.narration: The toolbar gives you access to all your creative tools — stickers, widgets, text, shapes, and more.

steps.label: Pan around the canvas
steps.narration: Pan around the infinite canvas by clicking and dragging. There are no boundaries here.

steps.label: Zoom into the canvas
steps.narration: Zoom in to focus on details, or zoom out to see the big picture.

steps.label: Show the canvas in its current state
steps.narration: This is your workspace. Place stickers, install widgets, wire pipelines — the canvas is alive.

metadata.hook: What if your workspace was infinite and everything on it was interactive?
metadata.description: A quick tour of the StickerNest infinite canvas — the spatial operating system where stickers, widgets, and pipelines compose into interactive workspaces.
